member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.FullMetadataName(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.INamedTypeSymbol)
member.summary: Returns the namespace appended to the class's metadata name.
member.remarks: This is mostly used for generating file names.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.TryFullName(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.ITypeSymbol)
member.summary: This will return a full name if the type symbol is a IArrayTypeSymbol or INamedTypeSymbol. Otherwise it will return the symbol's name without a namespace.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.TryFullName(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.IArrayTypeSymbol)
member.summary: This will attempt to get the full name of the array, including its namespace and rank. If the ElementType is not a INamedTypeSymbol, then the full name may not be available.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.GetXmlDocs(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.ISymbol)
member.summary: This will return the XML Docs the for symbol.
member.remarks: This can only return a value if the class is in the current project. XML Docs from libraries are not avaialble.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.FullName(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.IMethodSymbol)
member.summary: Returns the full name of a method, including any type parameters. It does not inlcude parameters or the return type.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.NullableToken(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.ITypeSymbol)
member.summary: This is used to append a `?` to type name.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.FullName(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.INamedTypeSymbol)
member.summary: This will return a full name of a type, including the namespace and type arguments.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.FullNamespace(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.ISymbol)
member.summary: Returns the full namespace for a sumbol.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.HasDefaultConstructor(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.INamedTypeSymbol)
member.summary: Returns true if the class has a parameterless constructor.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.ReadWriteScalarProperties(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.INamedTypeSymbol)
member.summary: Returns a list of scalar properties with both a getter and setter.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.ReadableScalarProperties(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.INamedTypeSymbol)
member.summary: Returns a list of scalar properties with getters.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.WritableScalarProperties(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.INamedTypeSymbol)
member.summary: Returns a list of scalar properties with setters.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.CanRead(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.IPropertySymbol)
member.summary: Returns true if the property has a getter.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.CanWrite(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.IPropertySymbol)
member.summary: Returns true if the property has a setter.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.HasParameters(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.IPropertySymbol)
member.summary: Returns true if the property has any parameters.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.GetAttributes``1(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.ISymbol)
member.summary: Returns all of the attributes of a given type on the indicated symbol.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.GetAttribute``1(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.ISymbol)
member.summary: Returns null or the single attribute of the indicated type.
member.remarks: This will throw an error if multiple copies of the same attribute.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.HasAttribute``1(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.ISymbol)
member.summary: Returns true if the symbol has at least one instance of the indicated attribute.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.TypeConstraintString(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.IMethodSymbol)
member.summary: Returns the complete set of type constraints for a method.

member.name: M:Tortuga.TestMonkey.SemanticHelper.TypeConstraintString(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.ITypeParameterSymbol)
member.summary: Returns the constraints for a type parameter, including the `where` keyword.

member.name: T:IFY.Shimr.Gen.SyntaxParsing.ShimTypeDefinition
member.summary: Represents everything important about a shim type.

member.name: P:IFY.Shimr.Gen.SyntaxParsing.ShimTypeDefinition.AdditionalShims
member.summary: Any additional shims found during parsing that will need to be generated.

member.name: T:IFY.Shimr.Gen.SyntaxParsing.TypeDef
member.summary: Represents a type within the code.

member.name: P:IFY.Shimr.Gen.SyntaxParsing.TypeDef.FullName
member.summary: The full referencable name of the type. Include generic arguments, "[]", "?", etc.

member.name: T:IFY.Shimr.ConstructorShimAttribute
member.summary: Mark a method as being a shim of a constructor.

member.name: T:IFY.Shimr.IShim
member.summary: Interface for all shimmed types

member.name: M:IFY.Shimr.IShim.Unshim
member.summary: Return the original object that has been shimmed.

member.name: T:IFY.Shimr.ProxyBehaviour
member.summary: Specify how the member is expected to behave.

member.name: F:IFY.Shimr.ProxyBehaviour.Default
member.summary: Will override existing members, otherwise adds.

member.name: F:IFY.Shimr.ProxyBehaviour.Override
member.summary: Shimmed type must provide the member to be overriden.

member.name: F:IFY.Shimr.ProxyBehaviour.Add
member.summary: Shim must be defining a member not in the shimmed type.

member.name: T:IFY.Shimr.ShimAttribute
member.summary: Mark a member type as explicitly shimming an item with a different name.

member.name: P:IFY.Shimr.ShimAttribute.DefinitionType
member.summary: The type that defines the member, for when there's a conflict.

member.name: P:IFY.Shimr.ShimAttribute.ImplementationName
member.summary: The name of the member in the target type.

member.name: M:IFY.Shimr.ShimAttribute.#ctor(System.Type)
member.param: The type that defines the member, for when there's a conflict.

member.name: M:IFY.Shimr.ShimAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.param: The name of the member in the target type.

member.name: M:IFY.Shimr.ShimAttribute.#ctor(System.Type,System.String)
member.param: The type that defines the member, for when there's a conflict.
The name of the member in the target type.

member.name: T:IFY.Shimr.ShimProxyAttribute
member.summary: Mark a shim member as being a proxy to an implementation elsewhere.

member.name: P:IFY.Shimr.ShimProxyAttribute.ImplementationType
member.summary: The type that implements this member.

member.name: P:IFY.Shimr.ShimProxyAttribute.ImplementationName
member.summary: The name of the implemenation member.

member.name: P:IFY.Shimr.ShimProxyAttribute.Behaviour
member.summary: The behaviour of this proxy member.

member.name: T:IFY.Shimr.StaticShimAttribute
member.summary: Mark individual properties/fields or methods as being static within another type, or the entire interface.

member.name: P:IFY.Shimr.StaticShimAttribute.TargetType
member.summary: The type that implements this member.

member.name: P:IFY.Shimr.StaticShimAttribute.IsConstructor
member.summary: True if this member calls a constructor on the target type.

member.name: T:IFY.Shimr.TypeShimAttribute
member.summary: Mark signature type as being automatically shimmed from real implementation type
